prediction_storage.notes: Calibration is a downstream transform. Never overwrite raw model outputs or raw parsed numeric scores.

one_by_one.prompt_template: Score this audio from 1-10 based on the presence of the following emotion: {emotion}
one_by_one.description: One model call per audio/emotion pair. Store raw scores for all emotions, then calibrate downstream.

all_at_once.description: Paper-comparable mode: one model call per audio asking for all emotion scores.
